AccessTokenFormat.description: Format used when issuing access tokens.

Authority.description: Public authority or issuer URL exposed by the OpenID server.

DisableAccessTokenEncryption.description: Whether encrypted access tokens should be disabled.

EncryptionCertificateStoreLocation.description: Windows certificate store location that contains the encryption certificate.

EncryptionCertificateStoreName.description: Windows certificate store name that contains the encryption certificate.

EncryptionCertificateThumbprint.description: Thumbprint of the certificate used for token encryption.

SigningCertificateStoreLocation.description: Windows certificate store location that contains the signing certificate.

SigningCertificateStoreName.description: Windows certificate store name that contains the signing certificate.

SigningCertificateThumbprint.description: Thumbprint of the certificate used for signing tokens.

EnableTokenEndpoint.description: Whether the token endpoint is enabled.

EnableAuthorizationEndpoint.description: Whether the authorization endpoint is enabled.

EnableLogoutEndpoint.description: Whether the logout endpoint is enabled.

EnableUserInfoEndpoint.description: Whether the user info endpoint is enabled.

EnableIntrospectionEndpoint.description: Whether the introspection endpoint is enabled.

EnablePushedAuthorizationEndpoint.description: Whether the pushed authorization endpoint is enabled.

EnableRevocationEndpoint.description: Whether the revocation endpoint is enabled.

AllowPasswordFlow.description: Whether the resource owner password flow is allowed.

AllowClientCredentialsFlow.description: Whether the client credentials flow is allowed.

AllowAuthorizationCodeFlow.description: Whether the authorization code flow is allowed.

AllowRefreshTokenFlow.description: Whether refresh tokens can be exchanged for new access tokens.

AllowHybridFlow.description: Whether hybrid response types are allowed.

AllowImplicitFlow.description: Whether implicit response types are allowed.

DisableRollingRefreshTokens.description: Whether refresh token rolling should be disabled.

RequireProofKeyForCodeExchange.description: Whether PKCE is required for authorization code flows.

RequirePushedAuthorizationRequests.description: Whether clients must use pushed authorization requests.

UseReferenceAccessTokens.description: Whether reference access tokens should be issued instead of self-contained tokens.
